name: Tiger
special_abilities: {"name": "Keen Smell", "desc": "The tiger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell."}

{"name": "Pounce", "desc": "If the tiger moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the tiger can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action."}
actions: {"name": "Bite", "desc": "Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage.", "attack_bonus": 5}
{"name": "Claw", "desc": "Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.", "attack_bonus": 5}
